title: dunbaria glandulosa
intro: Dunbaria glandulosa is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as a climbing legume native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Dunbaria glandulosa is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating gastrointestinal issues due to its expectorant and carminative properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies.
